achievements.title: A Day at the Fair
achievements.description: Complete the A=A game and learn your uppercase letters
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Oh, That's What Those Are
achievements.description: Complete the a=a game and learn your lowercase letters
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: A Test of Your Skill
achievements.description: Complete the a=A_a game and learn the difference between upper and lowercase letters
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Cat + Cat = Cat
achievements.description: Complete the CAT=CAT game and finally learn how to spell
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: This Will Be on the Quiz
achievements.description: Complete the _AT game and learn how to spell again
achievements.author: Griffin

achievements.title: Preschool Graduate
achievements.description: Complete the CA_ game and learn how to spell again (again)
achievements.author: Griffin
